items.title: Production root domain serves successfully (no Cloudflare 530)
Production static CSS and JS assets serve successfully
items.note: Static assets returned Cloudflare 530 for ff.css and ff-app.js

items.title: Production Socket.IO / WebSocket behavior is non-fatal or correctly configured
items.note: Production / smoke path still attempts ws://127.0.0.1:5000/socket.io/
items.evidence: Playwright smoke captured WebSocket handshake 400 against localhost

items.title: UI/UX gate has no missing CSS id selector for ffLiveFeedTitle
items.note: UI/UX gate reports missing CSS id selector for #ffLiveFeedTitle
items.evidence: pw:ux failed in both light and dark theme

items.title: Smoke test has no fatal console errors
items.note: Smoke test failed due to fatal console error
items.evidence: pw:smoke failed on WebSocket console error

items.title: Stripe is using live publishable key
Stripe is using live secret key
PayPal is using live client credentials
Production webhook endpoints are configured correctly

PayPal callback / approval / cancel flows return correctly
